title: Llama's Re-Wrench
body:
A tiny resource pack addon that adds a 3D wrench to [Farcr's Re-Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/farcrs-re-create). I've always likes the resource pack but i wanted a bit more umpfh on the wrench.
![Wrench](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a20a120d201227a62a8e18e1bafe9ca940c2961a.png)
